proxyAdmin.description: Immutable admin of the InitializableImmutableAdminUpgradeabilityProxy. Set at deployment by PoolConfigurator._initTokenWithProxy(address(this)) — only PoolConfigurator can call upgradeTo / upgradeToAndCall on the AToken proxy. Hardcoded because the proxy is factory-deployed (no standalone creation tx for constructorArgs to read), and the on-chain admin() getter is gated by ifAdmin.

sparkRsETHPoolBalance.description: rsETH balance of Spark's rsETH AToken (0x856f1Ea7...). Bounds the impact of Kelp oracle manipulation since all Kelp oracle calls into Spark go through rsETH-collateralized positions.
